## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes with zero shellcheck warnings and zero shfmt diffs
- [ ] `make build` produces a valid artefact (`bash -n build/build-template.sh`)
- [ ] Tested on a real Ubuntu 24.04 or 26.04 VM (or noted why not)
- [ ] Australian English in all prose
- [ ] No new external dependencies introduced
- [ ] Cyberpunk theming language preserved in user-facing strings
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated if this is a user-visible change
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour changed
